name: Tabcorp Holdings Limited
analysis: TAH has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 29% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.8500, stop A$0.7078, target A$0.9613 (0.78:1) — then trail it.
